# Igra Network

> Igra is a programmable EVM-compatible layer built on top of Kaspa BlockDAG. It brings smart contracts, DeFi, and agentic infrastructure to Kaspa's high-throughput DAG architecture.

Igra Network enables developers to deploy Solidity smart contracts on Kaspa. The native gas token iKAS is pegged 1:1 to KAS. Attesters secure the network by staking $IGRA tokens to verify Igra-to-Kaspa state consistency via cryptographic anchors.

## Pages

- [Home](https://igralabs.com/hero): Landing page with project overview, latest news, ecosystem highlights, and roadmap
- [Ecosystem](https://igralabs.com/ecosystem): Projects and partners building on Igra Network
- [$IGRA Token](https://igralabs.com/igra-token): Token utility, distribution, and how to participate
- [Public Auction](https://igralabs.com/public-auction): IGRA public token auction (ZAP) — facts, contract addresses, FAQ, timeline, and how to participate
- [Team](https://igralabs.com/team): Core team members
- [Manifesto](https://igralabs.com/manifesto): Project philosophy and vision
- [Vision](https://igralabs.com/vision): Technical vision for Igra Network
- [Terms of Service](https://igralabs.com/terms): Legal terms of service
- [Privacy Policy](https://igralabs.com/privacy): Privacy policy

## Key Facts

- Token: $IGRA (security and governance token)
- Total supply: 10,000,000,000 IGRA
- Native gas token: iKAS (pegged 1:1 to KAS)
- Network: EVM-compatible layer on Kaspa BlockDAG
- Consensus: Attesters stake $IGRA to verify state consistency
- Governance: Igra DAO controls attestation rules, rewards, bridge configuration, and grants
- Contact: team@igralabs.com
- Legal: legal@igra.network
- Entity: Igra Association, Zug, Switzerland

## Public Auction (ZAP)

- Sale format: Continuous Clearing Auction (based on Uniswap's audited CCA contracts)
- Tokens for sale: 500,000,000 IGRA (5% of total supply)
- Payment method: iKAS
- Floor FDV: $60M
- No minimum or maximum bid amount
- Staking requirement: 400,000 IGRA per attester
- Tokens become transferable 1 week after ZAP commences
